examples: "It's gorse on th' moor that's openin' out," answered Dickon.
It's fair lovely in spring an' summer when th' gorse an' broom an' heather's in flower.
Her horse shied violently at a gorse bush.
Eventually, I decided on an area of lush turf, between two gorse bushes that would serve as windbreaks.
As they trim the grassy slopes of heather and gorse, they also open up spectacular views across the massif.
